case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MTA VS. JENNY CHAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,190.66 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MTA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JENNY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AUTH. TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED BY VIRGINIA HO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, JENNY $1,190.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,190.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JENNY
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AMILED TO THE PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
